category_sources: source_facts.description identifies gurk as a Signal Messenger client for terminal; official GitHub README repeats this purpose.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is gurk; official GitHub README heading is gurk.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents installation, usage, key bindings, uploads, and configuration.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/boxdot/gurk-rs, so repo enrichment is intentionally not repeated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify a terminal Signal client; README documents chat, key bindings, and configuration.
